name: WESTWOOD HOLDINGS GROUP INC
summary: Westwood Holdings Group, Inc. is a Delaware corporation operating as an investment management firm. The company provides investment advisory and related services. Based on the limited text available from Item 1, Westwood manages assets for clients through its consolidated subsidiaries. Further details about specific products, services, and markets are referenced in other sections of the 10-K filing not fully provided here.
